title: Miraculous Block
description: Miraculous mod for the Minecraft game. It added a huge amount of new content. Blocks, mobs, biomes. But the most important part is Miraculous, magical artifacts
body:
Miraculous mod for the Minecraft game. It added a huge amount of new content. Blocks, mobs, biomes. But the most important part is Miraculous, magical artifacts that grant their owners magical powers, as well as a magical costume and weapons. The source of these powers are cute creatures , who are actually powerful cosmic entities, and their name is Kwami.

New biome Clover Field.
Three-leaf clovers grow in it, and very rarely you can find four-leaf clovers. Also in this biome you can meet one of the new Ladybug mobs.

To start studying the mod, you need to find a new structure - the Temple of the Guardians. In the chests of this temple you can find a Grimoire. It contains Miraculous recipes

To create each Miraculous you will need to use a new Crystal Infusion Table block. With which you can make the essence of any concept, and then use it to create an inactive miraculous, to activate which you will need to perform the ritual described in the grimoire.

At the moment the mod will be added by Miraculous:
-Ladybug Miraculous-Power of Creation.
-Black cat Miraculous-Power of Destructions
It is able to create various items that may be useful to you, as well as restore damage caused by villains (in future versions)

The mod has quite flexible customization.
You can change: miraculous camouflage, costume, transformation sound, particles during transformation, and weapon skin.
